task.title: Create a minimal HTML5 customization plug-in
task.shortdesc: Build a minimal DITA-OT plug-in that depends on org.dita.html5 and overrides the HTML5 XSLT via the dita.xsl.html5 extension point.

context.codeblock: dita-ot/ plugins/ com.acme.html5.custom/ plugin.xml xsl/ html5/ override.xsl

step.cmd: Create plugin.xml with HTML5 XSL override and dependency:

info.codeblock: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <plugin id="com.acme.html5.custom" version="1.0.0"> <require plugin="org.dita.html5"/> <feature extension="dita.xsl.html5" file="xsl/html5/override.xsl"/> </plugin>

step.cmd: Install and integrate the plug-in from the DITA-OT directory:
Re-run dita --install whenever you edit plug-in files that affect catalogs or import maps.
